title: A Company’s Success Story
article_text: Our company became the main supplier for many industries, and that prize was a great recognition of our hard work. The CEO, whose vision was crucial, helped us dominate the market with a new acquisition of a smaller firm. We typically saw a variation in profits, but the proof of our growth was in the rising sales numbers. The laughter from our peers during a meeting was a sign that we had deeply enjoyed the success together. The unemployment rate fell, and many workers received assistance to find new jobs after the old factory closed its doors. The roof of the old building was repaired, and the wheel of progress turned faster than before. The soil in the fields was rich, and the crop yield had increased after the company provided new farming tools. The company offered a good pension plan, and many employees looked forward to their retirement with a peaceful life. The electricity bill was paid on time, and the wing of the building was used for storage. If we had not worked together, we would not have achieved such a high level of success, and everyone would have felt a loss of hope.

sentences.en: Our company became the main supplier for many industries, and that prize was a great recognition of our hard work.
sentences.zh: 我们公司成为许多行业的主要供应商，那个奖项是对我们辛勤工作的极大认可。

vocabulary.eng_def: to control or have a strong influence over something
vocabulary.example: The big company tried to dominate the market.

vocabulary.eng_def: a person or company that provides goods or services
vocabulary.example: We need a new supplier for our office paper.

vocabulary.eng_def: something given to someone for winning a competition or doing good work
vocabulary.example: She won first prize in the science contest.

vocabulary.eng_def: in the usual way; normally
vocabulary.example: He typically arrives at work at eight o'clock.

vocabulary.eng_def: a person who is the same age or has the same position as you
vocabulary.example: Her peers respect her for her honesty.

vocabulary.eng_def: money paid regularly to someone who has stopped working because of age
vocabulary.example: My grandfather gets a pension from the government.

vocabulary.eng_def: a part of a building that goes out from the main part
vocabulary.example: The hospital has a new wing for children.

vocabulary.eng_def: the act of buying or getting something
vocabulary.example: The company's acquisition of the small firm helped it grow.

vocabulary.eng_def: the sound of people laughing
vocabulary.example: Her joke caused a lot of laughter.

vocabulary.eng_def: in a strong or serious way
vocabulary.example: He was deeply moved by the story.

vocabulary.eng_def: the act of accepting that something is true or important
vocabulary.example: He received recognition for his hard work.

vocabulary.eng_def: a form of energy used for light, heat, and power
vocabulary.example: We use electricity to light our homes.

vocabulary.eng_def: help or support
vocabulary.example: She offered her assistance to the old man.

vocabulary.eng_def: the top covering of a building
vocabulary.example: The roof of the house is made of tiles.

vocabulary.eng_def: the time when you stop working because of age
vocabulary.example: He is looking forward to his retirement next year.

vocabulary.eng_def: in the order given
vocabulary.example: Tom and Jerry are 10 and 12 years old, respectively.

vocabulary.eng_def: a change in amount or level
vocabulary.example: There is a variation in temperature between day and night.

vocabulary.eng_def: finally; in the end
vocabulary.example: Ultimately, we decided to stay home.

vocabulary.eng_def: information that shows something is true
vocabulary.example: Do you have proof that he did it?

vocabulary.eng_def: the top layer of earth in which plants grow
vocabulary.example: The soil in this garden is very rich.

image_prompts: A company building with a sign reading 'Main Supplier' and a trophy on a desk.
A CEO pointing at a graph showing market dominance, with a small company logo being absorbed.
A line chart showing profit variation with an arrow pointing upward to highlight proof of growth.
A group of colleagues laughing together in a meeting room, with smiles and joyful expressions.
A factory closing its doors with a 'Help Wanted' sign nearby, and workers receiving assistance forms.
An old building with a repaired roof and a large wheel turning next to it, symbolizing progress.
A farmer holding rich soil in his hands next to a field of tall crops with new farming tools nearby.
An office with a 'Pension Plan' poster and an elderly couple smiling while sitting in a peaceful garden.
A building with a side wing used for storage, and an electricity meter showing 'Paid'.
A group of people shaking hands in celebration, with a banner saying 'Success Together' in the background.
